markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the initial content calendar and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Calendar Ready:** 71 new article ideas are in the Airtable "Content OS" for review, covering 6 core clusters and a mix of TOFU/MOFU/BOFU topics.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [**Competitor Strategy:** Top competitors (Pinecone, Mongo) use separate sites for technical vs. SEO content, a model Redis should consider for its blog vs. glossary.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**AI Pipeline:** GrowthX will use a new "agentic" AI pipeline that self-evaluates its research and drafts, ensuring higher quality and reducing human editing.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [**First Articles:** The initial focus is on new content to align on voice/tone. Refreshes of underperforming articles will follow, guided by a content audit.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

## Topics

### Competitor Content Strategy

  - [Top competitors use separate sites for distinct content types to maximize search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [**Pinecone:** "Blog" for technical content, "Learn" for SEO-focused foundational topics.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**Mongo:** "Blog" for news, "Resources" for SEO articles.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [**Redis Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [The "Glossary" was created by an SEO specialist for fast content launches, separate from the main content team.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [The "Blog" and "Learn" sites have undefined distinctions.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Action:** Redis should define clear roles for its various content sites (Blog, Glossary, Learn) to optimize for both technical depth and SEO traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### New Content Calendar & Review Process

  - [**Content OS (Airtable):** The central hub for managing the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [**Views:** `Ideas for Review`, `Drafts for Review`, `Published Docs`.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [**`Ideas for Review`:** Contains 71 new article topics.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
          - [**Grouping:** By 6 topic clusters (e.g., Industry Solutions, LLMs).](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
          - [**Topic Mix:** Includes foundational ("what is"), MOFU (e.g., "optimize payment processing"), and BOFU (e.g., "improve app UX with Redis") content.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [**Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
      - [**Action:** Review ideas in the `Ideas for Review` view.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Use Airtable comments or emojis (👍/👎) on each record.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Goal:** Align on voice, tone, and product messaging before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### Content Generation Pipeline

  - [**"Agentic Pipelines":** A new, self-evaluating AI system to ensure high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
    1.  [**Research:** AI generates questions, finds answers, and self-evaluates its research quality.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
    2.  [**Drafting:** AI writes the article using writing guidelines and a proofreading checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
    3.  [**Self-Correction:** AI evaluates its own draft against the guidelines and revises it.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Product Accuracy:** A separate artifact can be added to the pipeline to fact-check all product claims, ensuring technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Content Audit & Refresh Strategy

  - [**Audit in Progress:** GrowthX is analyzing 6-month traffic data for the blog and glossary to identify underperforming articles for refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [**Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Now):** Focus on new content to align on voice/tone.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Steady State):** Combine new content with refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [**Data Provided:** Alexis shared 12-month traffic data (sessions, sign-ups) for the top 10 blog posts and the `/learn` subdirectory to guide the audit.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Redis Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [Review the 71 article ideas in the Airtable `Content OS` and provide feedback via comments.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [Review pending artifacts: Audience Persona and Company Context.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [Add a checkbox column to Airtable for easier topic approval (test required due to Airtable's commenting-only access limits).](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [Secure access to the "cache modernization" slide deck.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Deliver the content audit findings and refresh candidates next week.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
      - [Share the new Looker dashboard (Search Console + GA4) this week.](https://fathom.video/share/74LmLmWPmjsdRKsPsTx6EGCAAMisxW-y?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
